mapper.select: INSERT INTO t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot ( work_order_id, tenant_id, workflow_type, policy_hash, affected_owner_count, minimum_affected_owner_participants, minimum_affected_owner_approvals, version, locked_by_user_id ) SELECT #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId}, #{workflowType}, #{policyHash}, #{affectedOwnerCount}, #{minimumParticipants}, #{minimumApprovals}, COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1, #{lockedByUserId} FROM t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} RETURNING policy_id

SELECT policy_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, workflow_type, policy_hash, affected_owner_count, minimum_affected_owner_participants, minimum_affected_owner_approvals, locked_by_user_id, locked_at FROM t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT acceptance_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, policy_id, round_no, status FROM t_repair_acceptance WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'COLLECTING' ORDER BY round_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_acceptance_party ( acceptance_id, tenant_id, participant_key, party_role, room_id, owner_uid, participant_account_id, participant_user_id, participant_name, participant_organization, committee_position, conclusion, opinion, submission_method, signature_hash, evidence_hash, seal_usage_id, submitted_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{acceptanceId}, #{tenantId}, #{party.participantKey}, #{party.partyRole}, #{party.roomId}, #{party.ownerUid}, #{party.participantAccountId}, #{party.participantUserId}, #{party.participantName}, #{party.participantOrganization}, #{party.committeePosition}, #{party.conclusion}, #{party.opinion}, #{party.submissionMethod}, #{party.signatureHash}, #{party.evidenceHash}, #{party.sealUsageId}, #{party.submittedByUserId} )
mapper.select: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (participant_key) participant_key, party_role, owner_uid, conclusion FROM t_repair_acceptance_party WHERE acceptance_id = #{acceptanceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY participant_key, submitted_at DESC, party_id DESC ), acceptance_policy AS ( SELECT policy.affected_owner_count FROM t_repair_acceptance acceptance JOIN t_repair_acceptance_policy_snapshot policy ON policy.policy_id = acceptance.policy_id WHERE acceptance.acceptance_id = #{acceptanceId} AND acceptance.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT affected_owner_count FROM acceptance_policy), 0) AS affected_owner_count, COUNT(DISTINCT owner_uid) FILTER ( WHERE party_role = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' )::INT AS participating_affected_owner_count, COUNT(DISTINCT owner_uid) FILTER ( WHERE party_role = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED' )::INT AS passed_affected_owner_count, COUNT(1) FILTER (WHERE conclusion = 'RECTIFICATION_REQUIRED')::INT AS rectification_count, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'BUILDING_LEADER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS building_leader_passed, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'COMMITTEE_EXECUTIVE_APPROVER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS committee_executive_passed, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'COMMITTEE_SEAL_OPERATOR' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS committee_seal_applied, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'PROPERTY_TECHNICAL_COSIGNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS property_technical_cosigned, COALESCE(BOOL_OR(party_role = 'THIRD_PARTY_TECHNICAL_COSIGNER' AND conclusion = 'PASSED'), FALSE) AS third_party_technical_cosigned FROM latest
